title: TMT Platform – Complete Testing Workflow & Setup
summary: Everything needed to test features on the TMT affiliate marketing platform (tmt.affnook.io / oscorp7.affnookqa1.online). Covers the full test execution flow: Brand → Campaign → Affiliate → Tracking Link → Postman (Create Customer + Activity) → Reports. Includes Postman header config per panel (TMT, AB Network, AB Operator, BiAffiliation, KtAccount, tmtpanel), API endpoints, x-api-key location, report wait time (~2 min), and how to get the tracking_token from the browser URL after clicking a generated affiliate link. Also references how to build TC sheets and execute them.
